shared_properties: Panel canvas remains 200x120px so clear and game-over states share the same centered safe area.
Stat lanes for elapsed time and best record keep the same internal spacing as the game-over panel.
8px HUD typography continues to drive supporting labels and footer text.
differences: Title text switches to ESCAPED and introduces a brighter gold-accent celebration frame.
Footer changes from a restart hint to an Enter or auto-return cue tuned for clear-state flow.
Record badge treatment becomes more celebratory while preserving the same core stat layout.

context.usage: Centered clear-state panel shown after the player reaches the exit gate.

shape.silhouette: Centered celebratory summary panel with title block, stat slots, and return footer.
shape.collision_read: UI-only asset with no collision meaning.

acceptance_criteria: Clear-state gold accents remain visibly brighter than the game-over panel while preserving text legibility.
The return cue reads clearly within the footer area and does not compete with the survival time slot.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds HUD contrast, muted dungeon palette, and low-saturation screen overlays for the active widget.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for the summary frame with child atlas-driven digits and text labels.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during the Loading state and cache the frame handle in the clear-state UI resource.
runtime_notes: Use Bevy 0.13 with ImagePlugin::default_nearest() so every asset stays pixel-perfect at 4x upscale.
Reuse the timer glyph atlas for stat values so clear and failure states stay visually consistent.
Toggle the panel visibility on goal contact after gameplay movement is paused.
